title: The Archivist's Dilemma
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A meticulous university archivist who can spot a forged document by the smell of its ink discovers a set of love letters hidden in a 1906 geography textbook that, if authentic, would prove a beloved local philanthropist was actually a serial arsonist.
long_description: A meticulous university archivist who can spot a forged document by the smell of its ink discovers a set of love letters hidden in a 1906 geography textbook that, if authentic, would prove a beloved local philanthropist was actually a serial arsonist.
